meaning: Three special letters: Alif, Lam, Ra (that begin this chapter)
it (feminine) was made firm/precise (referring to ءَايٰتُهُۥ/its verses)
then (connects this ayah to the previous one)
it (feminine) was explained in detail (referring to ءَايٰتُهُۥ - His verses)
from near/from the presence of (of حَكِيمٍ خَبِيرٍ)
wise one (describes كِتٰبٌ, connected to خَبِيرٍ)
fully aware/informed (describing حَكِيمٍ and showing it follows مِن)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ - worship)
Allah (as the object being worshipped in أَلَّا تَعْبُدُوٓا۟)
for you all (recipients of نَذِيرٌ وَبَشِيرٌ)
and a giver of good news
all of you seek forgiveness! (command to رَبَّكُمْ - your Lord)
then (connects تُوبُوٓا۟ 'turn in repentance' to what came before)
he will give you all enjoyment (if you seek forgiveness)
a temporary provision (object of يُمَتِّعْكُم - He will provide you)
good/beautiful (describes the enjoyment متٰعًا that Allah will give)
and he gives/brings (connected to يُمَتِّعْكُم - he provides you)
owner of, possessor of (describes فَضْلٍ - bounty)
then indeed I (connected to تَوَلَّوْا۟ - they turn away)
upon you all (connected to أَخَافُ - I fear)
all-powerful (describes اللَّهِ and shows it's being used as a description)
indeed they (emphasizes the pronoun 'they' before يَثْنُونَ)
they turn away (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in إِنَّهُمْ)
so that they may hide themselves
they seek to cover themselves (subject of يَثْنُونَ)
their clothes (object of يَسْتَغْشُونَ - they cover)
they make public (what they do, in contrast to يُسِرُّونَ 'what they conceal')
indeed he/it (subject of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
All-Knowing (as an inherent quality of Allah)
with/by that which (is in الصُّدُورِ - the chests/hearts)
and what/not - a combination of 'and' plus a word that can mean 'what' when asking questions or 'not' when negating
except (shows that رِزْقُهَا 'its provision' is different from other things)
its provision (referring to the creature دَآبَّةٍ mentioned earlier)
and he knows (connected to رِزْقُهَا - its provision)
in (connects كِتٰبٍ to what came before)
The one who (connects to خَلَقَ - created)
and he was (connects to عَرْشُهُۥ - His throne)
so that he may test you all (purpose of خَلَقَ/created)
which of you (asking about who does better deeds)
and indeed if (connects to previous statement)
from (connects بَعْدِ to what comes before it)
this (pointing to what the disbelievers say next)
except (negates what comes before it in this ayah)
mere magic (something claimed by الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟)
a clear one (describing سِحْرٌ/magic in this ayah)
he will most surely say indeed
holds it back (referring to العَذَابَ - the punishment)
behold! (introducing what يَقُولُنَّ they will say)
day (object of يَأْتِيهِمْ - comes to them)
comes to them (referring to العَذَابَ/the punishment)
turned away/diverted (describing the punishment in this ayah)
and it surrounded and overtook (the subject of يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ)
what (asking about what is holding back العَذَابَ)
they were (referring to those who mock in this ayah)
with/by it (referring to العذاب - the punishment)
the human being (as the one receiving رَحْمَةً/mercy)
from us (referring to the mercy being taken away)
a mercy (object of أَذَقْنَا - we made taste)
truly one who loses hope a lot (describing الإنسٰن/mankind)
blessing (that Allah gave him after hardship)
she touched/felt him (referring to نَعْمَآءَ blessing)
he went away (subject of لَيَقُولَنَّ - he will surely say)
those (far away, referring to the patient believers mentioned before)
for them (referring to الَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا - those who were patient)
and a reward (doer, described by كَبِيرٌ)
a leaver/one who leaves (subject of لَعَلَّكَ)
some/part (of what is revealed to you)
or (connecting to لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ كَنزٌ - 'why has not a treasure been sent down upon him')
only/but (introducing what follows in the ayah: أَنتَ نَذِيرٌ - you are a warner)
a warner (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this ayah)
upon/over (connecting to كُلِّ شَىْءٍ - all things)
or (connecting to previous statement in يَقُولُونَ)
he made it up (object of يَقُولُونَ)
say! (a command from Allah ﷻ to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to مِن دُونِ)
you all were (addressing multiple people in the past)
And if not (connects to يَسْتَجِيبُوا۟ - they respond)
to/for you all (responding to يَسْتَجِيبُوا - they respond)
with knowledge (connected to أُنزِلَ - it was sent down)
god/deity (object of لَّآ meaning 'there is no')
so/then are? (asking if something follows from previous statement)
those who submit completely to Allah (plural)
he wants/desires (describes who wants الْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا - the worldly life)
and its adornment (referring to الْحَيَوٰةَ الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
we fulfill completely (to them their deeds)
to them (receiving the actions in نُوَفِّ)
their deeds (referring to those who desire worldly life mentioned in أَعْمٰلَهُمْ)
in it (referring to الْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
in it/her (referring to الْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
they are being reduced unfairly (subject of لا)
those (pointing to people far away) (subject of لَيْسَ)
those who/which (referring to multiple people in أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ - 'those')
and it became worthless (referring to مَا صَنَعُوا۟ - what they did)
they made/created (refers to what the disbelievers did)
in it (referring to النَّارُ - the fire)
that which (refers to what they made/did, with emphasis)
they work (referring to those who disbelieve in the ayah)
Then is the one who...? (asking about someone)
he was (introduces a description in this ayah)
those (pointing to something far) (subject of يُؤْمِنُونَ)
so not/then not (connected to يَكْفُرْ - disbelieve)
from him/it (referring to شَاهِدٌ - a witness)
from (connects رَبِّكَ to what came before)
of your Lord (who cares for and helps you grow)
of the people (owned by أَكْثَرَ - most)
more/most unjust (than مِمَّنِ who comes after)
against (referring to telling lies against اللَّهِ)
they are being shown (refers to those who lied about Allah)
upon/on top of (connected to رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
their master who nurtures (object of كَذَبُوا)
the witnesses (subject of يَقُولُ - he says)
these ones/these people (who are being referred to)
those who/the ones who (subject of كَذَبُوا)
upon (connecting رَبِّهِمْ to what comes before)
curse (subject of sentence, belonging to اللَّهِ)
those who (subject of يَصُدُّونَ - they prevent)
those who make others unable (object of يَكُونُوا)
those (far away, pointing to the disbelievers mentioned)
and he strayed (connecting to خَسِرُوٓا۟ - they lost)
away from them/about them (referring to false gods they made up)
indeed they (are the losers in هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ)
and they became humble and submissive (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and cares for them)
those (plural, far away, referring to the believers mentioned before)
the Paradise (referring to the eternal garden in the afterlife)
they/them (referring to أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ - the companions of Paradise)
the two distinct groups (being compared: the blind/deaf versus the seeing/hearing)
like the blind one (compared to ٱلْبَصِيرِ/the seeing one)
and the deaf one (paired with الْأَعْمَىٰ)
and the one who sees/perceives (intensely) (contrasted with ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ)
an example (object of يَسْتَوِيَانِ/are they equal)
so will you not? (connected to تَذَكَّرُونَ - you remember)
Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
indeed I (speaking to قَوْمِهِ - his people)
a warner (someone whose job is to warn others)
you (all) worship (connected to أَن لَّا meaning 'that not')
Allah (the one true God who is the object of يَعْبُدُوا/worship)
and then he said (after what came before in the story)
the assembly, the chiefs (subject of قَالَ)
from (connects قَوْمِهِۦ to what came before)
a human being (object of نَرَىٰكَ - we see you)
like us (describes بَشَرًا - a human being)
followed you (object of نَرَىٰ - we see)
except (connects to نَرَىٰكَ - we see you)
they/them (referring to أَرَاذِلُنَا - our lowest people)
for you all (object of نَرَىٰ - we see)
rather/but rather (introduces the disbelievers' real opinion about نَظُنُّكُمْ كٰذِبِينَ - we think you are liars)
we think you all (without being sure) (subject of كٰذِبِينَ)
O my people! (being called by نوح)
a clear evidence (connected to مِّن رَّبِّى)
a mercy (that Allah gave to Nuh)
from (connecting رَحْمَةً with رَّبِّى, with emphasis)
so it was made unclear (referring to the evidence/sign mentioned)
shall we compel you all to accept it?
I ask you all (object of asking in this ayah)
wealth/money (as the object of أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)
for (it) (referring to payment/reward mentioned in أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ مَالًا)
with/by one who drives away (connected to أَنَا۠ - I am)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)
indeed they (referring to those who believed)
their Lord (referring to the believers mentioned in ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
And O my people! (in possessive/genitive case)
if (introduces condition for طَرَدتُّهُمْ - 'I were to drive them away')
then will you not? (connects to تَذَكَّرُونَ - you remember)
to/for you all (object of أَقُولُ - I say)
with me, in my possession (object of أَقُولُ)
and not (connected to أَقُولُ - I say)
and not (connected to أَقُولُ - I say)
she looks down upon (your eyes أَعْيُنُكُمْ)
your (all of you) eyes (subject of تَزْدَرِى - looking down upon)
he gives them (object of لَن in this ayah)
any good (object of يُؤْتِيَهُمُ - give them)
therefore/in that case (shows consequence of لَن يُؤْتِيَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرًا)
they said (the people speaking to Noah)
and you made (something) increase (in arguing with نُوحُ)
our arguing (object of أَكْثَرْتَ - you increased)
with it/him (referring to what اللَّهُ brings)
if (introduces condition for شَآءَ - He wills)
able to make (something) impossible (as a negative with أنتم)
and not - joins two ideas and makes the second one negative
he helps/benefits you all (in response to نُصْحِىٓ - my advice)
that (connects أَرَدتُّ 'I wanted' to أَنصَحَ 'to advise')
to/for you all (object of أَنصَحَ - I advise)
if (introduces the condition 'if I wanted' before 'my advice would not benefit you')
he misleads you all (object of يُرِيدُ - wants to)
He (referring to Allah in this context)
your caring Lord (the one being discussed in يُرِيدُ)
or (asking a question to challenge what was said before)
he fabricated it (object of يَقُولُونَ - they say)
say! (as a response to يَقُولُونَ - they say)
I fabricated it (responding to their claim in أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ)
then upon me (connected to إِجْرَامِى/my crime)
innocent, free (from what تُجْرِمُونَ you commit of crimes)
from (connecting قَوْمِكَ to the previous phrase)
your people (connected to مِن/from in this verse)
except (excluding those who already believed from نُوحٍ's people)
so not (connected to يُؤْمِنَ - will believe)
they do/are doing (referring to the disbelievers in نُوحٍ's people)
and make! (command to Noah to build the ark)
the ship (object of وَٱصْنَعِ - and construct)
under our watchful eyes (watching over the construction of the ark)
you speak to me (don't speak to me!)
upon him (object of يَصْنَعُ - he builds)
chiefs, nobles (subject of سَخِرُوا - they mocked)
they made fun (of مِنْهُ - of him)
from him (who is being mocked in سَخِرُوا)
you all mock (in response to سَخِرُوا۟ - they mocked)
from you all (who are mocking نوح)
just as (referring to how they mock in تَسْخَرُونَ)
you all mock (referring to multiple people)
then soon/will (connects to تَعْلَمُونَ - you will know)
you (all) will know (referring to the disbelievers who will soon know about the punishment mentioned in مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌ)
whoever (subject of يَأْتِيهِ - comes to him)
comes to him (referring to عَذَابٌ - punishment)
a punishment (subject of يَأْتِيهِ - comes to him)
and he settles/will settle (descends upon عَلَيْهِ)
the oven (subject of فَارَ - it overflowed)
from (connects كُلٍّ 'each' to what comes after)
and your family (object of اِحْمِلْ - carry)
he went ahead (of عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ - the word/decree against him)
except (connects to مَن who/whoever in this ayah)
a small amount/few (describing مَنْ ءَامَنَ - those who believed)
ride!/board! (commanding a group) (followed by فِيهَا - in it)
and its place of anchoring (paired with مَجْر۪ىٰهَا)
with/by them (object of تَجْرِى - it sails)
in/within (location in مَعْزِلٍ - a place apart)
a wave (in مَوْجٍ كَٱلْجِبَالِ - waves like mountains)
like the mountains (describing the size of the waves in مَوْجٍ)
and he called out loudly (subject of this verb is نُوحٌ)
in a place apart (from نُوحٌ and the believers)
Board! (command to one person, from نُوحٌ to his son)
and do not (command to نُوحٌ's son)
you be (in the negative command لَا تَكُن)
I will take shelter (response to قَالَ - he said)
to, towards (connecting to جَبَلٍ - a mountain)
a mountain (that he was seeking refuge on)
he protects me (from مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ - from the water)
except (introduces the exception مَن رَّحِمَ - whoever He has mercy on)
and it came between (subject: الْمَوْجُ - the wave)
between them both (separating the son and his father)
the wave (subject of came between them)
so he was (connected to لَا عَاصِمَ - no protector)
O earth! (being directly commanded in وَقِيلَ يٰٓأَرْضُ ٱبْلَعِى - 'and it was said: O earth, swallow')
and it was decreased (connected to أَقْلِعِى)
and it was decided/settled (connected to وَغِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ - and the water subsided)
the matter (subject of قُضِىَ - was settled)
and it (the ark) became settled (on الْجُودِيِّ)
on, upon, over (of الْجُودِىِّ - Mount Judi)
Mount Judi (the elevated mountain where Noah's ark rested)
and it was said (connected to وَغِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ - and the water subsided)
away with! (expressing rejection of الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ - the wrongdoing people)
his Lord (object being called by Noah)
then he said (after Nuh called upon his Lord)
and indeed (connects to فَقَالَ/so he said)
Your promise (object of إِنَّ in Nuh's prayer to Allah)
O Noah! (being called by Allah in قَالَ)
from (connecting أَهْلِكَ to show 'from your family')
so do not (connecting to تَسْـَٔلْنِ - ask me)
what (asking about something that is not knowledge/علْمٌ)
for you (connected to لَيْسَ - is not)
the people who don't know or understand (after مِنَ)
he said (introduces what Nuh عليه السلام says next)
with You (object of seeking refuge in أَعُوذُ)
that (connects to أَسْـَٔلَكَ - I ask you)
I ask you (object of أَعُوذُ - I seek refuge)
what (object of أَسْـَٔلَكَ - I ask you)
and if not (connects to تَغْفِرْ - forgive)
and you show mercy to me (connected to تَغْفِرْ)
with (a special kind of divine) peace (that comes from Allah)
and nations (connected to بَرَكٰتٍ/blessings in the ayah)
then (connecting what happens to أُمَمٌ with what came before)
from us (connected to بِسَلٰمٍ - with peace)
a punishment (that will come to أُمَمٌ)
that (feminine, pointing to something far away)
of the news (plural) (possessed by الْغَيْبِ - the unseen)
of the unseen (part of أَنۢبَآءِ ٱلْغَيْبِ - news of the unseen)
we reveal it (referring to these stories of the unseen)
to you (the one being told about the stories)
you know it/her (referring to the stories/news mentioned before)
you (masculine singular) (subject of كُنتَ - you were)
and not (connecting to the previous statement تَعْلَمُهَآ)
for the pious ones (end of description of العٰقِبَة)
Hud (as their brother who was sent to them)
O my people! (being called by هُود)
Allah (as the object of اعْبُدُوا - worship)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
those who make up false things (subject of أَنتُمْ)
O my people! (addressing his own community)
I ask you all (object of أَسْـَٔلُ)
a reward (object of أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)
indeed (emphasizing that the speaker's reward is only from Allah)
upon (connecting أَجْرًا to the following phrase)
he created me (referring to Allah's creation)
then will you not? (connected to تَعْقِلُونَ - use reason)
all of you seek forgiveness! (command to group before رَبَّكُمْ/your Lord)
all of you return back! (plural command)
the sky (as the object being sent)
upon you all (object of يُرْسِلِ - he sends)
heavily pouring (describing how the sky sends rain)
a power, a strength (as the object being added to)
those who commit wrong (being turned away from)
with a clear proof (object of جِئْتَنَا through بِ)
he came upon you (object of بعض)
he said (in response to their accusation)
I call to witness (acted on الله)
Allah (as the object of أُشْهِدُ - I call to witness)
indeed I (speaking to قَالَ - he said)
besides Him/other than Him (owned, after مِن)
indeed I (speaking before تَوَكَّلْتُ - I have relied)
I put my complete trust (connected to عَلَى ٱللَّهِ - in Allah)
except (excluding what comes after from what was mentioned before)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
by/with its forelock (referring to every creature mentioned before)
my Lord (in relation to اللَّهِ - Allah)
they turned themselves away (subject of فَقَدْ أَبْلَغْتُكُم)
I delivered to you all (referring to the message mentioned in مَّآ أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِۦٓ)
what/that which (emphasized, referring to the message sent)
I was sent (as a messenger to you all)
a people (who will be brought as replacement)
my Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains me)
upon, over (relating to كُلِّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
he came (subject of أَمْرُنَا) with emphasis
Prophet Hud (the object being saved in نَجَّيْنَا)
they believed (referring to those who believed with هُودًا)
with an act of kindness (from مِّنَّا - from Us)
from (connecting عَذَابٍ 'punishment' to what came before)
and that (feminine, pointing to something far)
they denied/rejected (truth they knew) (subject of عَصَوْا۟)
with/by the signs (of رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
and they disobeyed (connected to جَحَدُوا۟ - they denied)
and they followed closely/deliberately (subject of أَمْرَ - followed the command)
stubbornly resistant (describing جَبَّارٍ - tyrant, in a possessive/descriptive phrase)
and they were made to follow
a curse (object of أُتْبِعُوا/they were followed by)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and cares for them)
Now behold! (used to draw attention to what follows)
surely for Aad (emphatic, referring to the tribe's punishment)
a righteous one (object of implied 'We sent')
worship! (command to all of you) (connected to قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ - he said: O my people)
Allah (as the object being worshipped in اعْبُدُوا)
any deity (in مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ - you have no deity)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
He created you all (Allah is the subject)
and He made you all build/develop (referring to Allah)
so seek forgiveness from Him! (command to many people)
in us (object of كُنتَ - you were)
hoped for (as the object being described)
that (introduces what they were forbidden from: نَّعْبُدَ - worshipping)
surely in (expressing doubt about ما تَدْعُونَآ)
from what (that you call us to)
causing doubt (describes شَكٍّ/doubt, in a state of being owned/possessed)
O my people! (subject of قَالَ - he said)
if (introduces condition for عَصَيْتُهُۥ - I disobey Him)
and he gave me/brought to me
a specific act of kindness (object of آتَانِي - He gave me)
so who (asking about يَنصُرُنِى - will help me)
so what (connects to يَنصُرُنِى - will help me)
other than (object of تَزِيدُونَنِى - you increase me)
a causing of loss (object of غَيْرَ)
the female camel (subject of تَأْكُلْ - she eats)
a sign (object of فَذَرُوهَا - so leave her)
